args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE title = 'Street Hype' AND artist = 'Brucqe Maginnis'

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE title = 'Street Hype' AND artist = 'Brucqe Maginnis'

result.preview: [{"track_id": "4122", "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis", "album": "Groove City", "year": "2005", "length": "177000", "language": "English"}, {"track_id": "4628", "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "None", "year": "'05", "length": "2.95", "language": "English"}, {"track_id": "14080", "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City (2005)", "year": "None", "length": "2m 57sec", "language": "Eng."}]

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%'

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE title LIKE '%Street Hype%' OR artist LIKE '%Brucqe Maginnis%'

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) as total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

result.preview: [{"track_id": "4122", "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis", "album": "Groove City"}, {"track_id": "4628", "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "None"}, {"track_id": "14080", "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City (2005)"}]

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album FROM tracks WHERE artist LIKE '%Maginnis%' AND title LIKE '%Hype%'

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album FROM tracks WHERE artist LIKE '%Maginnis%' AND title LIKE '%Hype%'

result.preview: "iTunes earned the most revenue for the song 'Street Hype' by Brucqe Maginnis, generating a total of $505.61 across all countries."
